title: MT202 / MT202COV Wire Transfers Silently Dropped — GL Break $284.7M
description: WIRE-NIGHTLY-RECON-20260316 detected a General Ledger break of $284,700,000. Root cause: swift_parser.py:parse_message() handles only MT103. MT202 (47 messages) and MT202COV (12 messages) are dropped silently with no exception raised. Affected wires were not posted to the GL, causing nostro account reconciliation failure.
defect_description: parse_message() handles MT103 only — no else/raise for MT202/MT202COV
